🤝 TRADE & BATTLE

Share codes with friends to trade Pokémon or battle each other — no internet needed!

📋 HOW IT WORKS
1. You and your friend both open the game
2. One person generates a Trade Offer or Battle Challenge
3. Copy the code and send it (text, Discord, etc.)
4. Your friend pastes the code and responds!
💱 TRADE POKÉMON

Share your team as a battle challenge. Your friend can fight your team!
